title: Demon Slayer
description:
After demons slaughter his family and transform his younger sister Nezuko into a demon, Tanjiro Kamado joins the Demon Slayer Corps to search for a cure and destroy the monsters threatening humanity. Alongside his companions Zenitsu Agatsuma and Inosuke Hashibira, Tanjiro travels across Japan fighting increasingly powerful demons connected to the terrifying Demon King, Muzan Kibutsuji.

Throughout his journey, Tanjiro faces dangerous missions and intense battles across multiple arcs, including the Final Selection, Mugen Train, Entertainment District, Swordsmith Village, and Hashira Training arcs. As he trains with the Hashira and uncovers the tragic secrets behind demons and the Demon Slayer Corps itself, the conflict between humanity and Muzan’s forces grows closer to its final battle. Filled with breathtaking animation, emotional storytelling, and spectacular sword fights, Demon Slayer tells a powerful story about family, sacrifice, determination, and the struggle to protect humanity from darkness.
